holdings.infoBox: FTDS is an equity ETF with a total of 51 individual holdings. The top holdings are Reliance stock at 2.54%, Targa Resources at 2.27%, IDEX Corporation at 2.23%, Popular at 2.21%, and General Dynamics at 2.21%.

overview.description: The First Trust Dividend Strength ETF (FTDS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the The Dividend Strength index. The fund tracks an index of approximately 50 US stocks or REITs considered to be well-capitalized and have a history of increasing their dividends. Holdings are selected based on fundamental criteria and equally-weighted within the portfolio. FTDS was launched on Dec 6, 2006 and is issued by First Trust.
